semantics.label: Tutorial and Examples: Papi Jo's Drupal test site
semantics.description: █

semantics.label: Task description
semantics.default: Try to guess the mysterious sentence/word
semantics.description: A guide telling the user how to do this task.

semantics.label: Wordle Option: Guess a word
semantics.description: Check this option if you want the player to have to guess single words of 4 to 8 letters instead of sentences.

semantics.label: Play Mode
semantics.description: Select your play mode

options.label: Allow user to enter their own sentence

semantics.label: Play Mode Wordle
semantics.description: Select your play mode

options.label: Allow user to enter their own word

semantics.label: Enable "Audio"
semantics.description: Enable "Audio" for the sentences to be guessed?

semantics.label: Sentences
semantics.description: Simply type the sentences/phrases/words to be guessed by the students. You may split word parts with a forward slash e.g. "An anti/constitut/ion/al act"

semantics.label: Words
semantics.description: Type the words of 4 to 8 letters to be guessed by the students.

fields.label: Word
fields.description: Type one word of 4 to 8 letters. Uppercase, lowercase, and Western European accented letters are accepted.

semantics.label: Behavioural settings.
semantics.description: These options will let you control how the task behaves.

fields.label: Enable "Continue game"
fields.description: Add a "Continue game" button to the summary when unfinished sentences remain. This option is ignored when Number of words Choice is enabled.

fields.label: Case sensitive
fields.description: Makes sure the user input has to be exactly the same as the answer.

fields.label: Enable Number of words Choice
fields.description: Check this option to allow the user to select the number of words (per sentence) to guess. Do NOT check this option if your sentences make up a story!

fields.label: Allow learner to select the number of items
fields.description: Allow the learner to select how many words or sentences are drawn from the available list before play starts. This option is ignored when learners enter their own word or sentence. Do not combine it with "Enable Number of words Choice".

fields.label: Enable "View Summary" button
fields.description: Allow the player to open the summary without guessing the current sentence.

fields.label: Number of rounds before Solutions or View Summary
fields.description: Minimum number of rounds before the "Show solution" or "View Summary" buttons can be displayed:

fields.label: Maximum number of tries to guess the word (Wordle option)
fields.description: Maximum number of tries before Game is over and Solution is displayed:

fields.label: When to display the audio buttons
fields.description: If a sentence has an audio attached to it, select WHEN you want to display the audio buttons.

options.label: Only when the blanks have been correctly filled in

fields.label: Display Guessed Sentences
fields.description: Check this to add each guessed sentence to a display list after each successful attempt. This option is useful if your sentences make up a story.

fields.label: Display audio and tip buttons in Guessed Sentences
fields.description: Select how you want to display the audio and tip buttons in front of each sentence in the list of guessed sentences.

fields.label: Items Order
fields.description: Select the order in which the words or sentences will be displayed. Use normal order if the items form a phrase or story.

semantics.label: Text for "Not enough rounds" message
semantics.default: This option won't be available before round @round
semantics.description: @round will be replaced by the minimum number of rounds needed before displaying solutions or viewing the summary

semantics.label: Text for "Fill in all the blanks" message
semantics.default: Please fill in all the blanks before checking your answer!

semantics.label: Text for "How many words do you want in your mystery sentence?" message
semantics.default: How many words do you want in your mystery sentence?
semantics.description: Only used if "Enable Number of words Choice" is enabled

semantics.label: Text for "Any number of words"
semantics.description: Only used if "Enable Number of words Choice" is enabled

semantics.label: Question asking how many items to use
semantics.description: @items will be replaced by the translated plural word for words or sentences.

semantics.label: Label for selecting every available item
Text for "Type a sentence to be guessed by your friends" message
semantics.default: Type a sentence to be guessed by your friends
semantics.description: Only used if playmode is set to "Allow users to enter their own sentence"

semantics.label: Text for the user-entered Wordle instruction
semantics.default: Type one word of 4 to 8 letters to be guessed by your friends. Typed lower-case letters will be automatically changed to upper-case.
semantics.description: Only used if playmode is set to "Allow user to enter their own word"

semantics.label: Text for "Type a Tip for this sentence (optional)" message
semantics.default: Type a Tip for this sentence (optional)
semantics.description: Only used if playmode is set to "Allow users to enter their own sentence"

semantics.label: Text for "Minimum number of rounds before Solutions can be displayed:" message
semantics.default: Minimum number of rounds before Solutions can be displayed:
semantics.description: Only used if playmode is set to "Allow users to enter their own sentence"

semantics.label: Text for "Maximum number of tries before Game is over and Solution is displayed:" message
semantics.default: Maximum number of tries before Game is over and Solution is displayed:
semantics.description: Only used if playmode is set to "Allow users to enter their own sentence" and Wordle option selected.

semantics.label: Text for the "Never show" radio button choice
semantics.description: Only used if playmode is set to "Allow users to enter their own sentence"

semantics.label: Text for the "No limit" radio button choice
semantics.description: Only used if playmode is set to "Allow users to enter their own sentence" and Wordle option selected.

semantics.label: Text for "sentence" singular word
semantics.description: This word will be used in various parts of the activity

semantics.label: Text for "word" singular word
semantics.description: This word will be used in various parts of the activity

semantics.label: Text for "word" plural word
semantics.description: This word will be used in various parts of the activity

semantics.label: Text for "sentence" plural word
semantics.description: This word will be used in various parts of the activity

semantics.label: Text for "Round" message below sentences to be guessed
semantics.description: @round will be replaced by the number of the current round

semantics.label: Time spent text
semantics.description: Label for showing the time spent while guessing one sentence

semantics.label: Score Explanation Button Label
semantics.description: Label for the 'Show score explanation' feedback text

semantics.label: Score Explanation for the Single Point score
semantics.default: The maximum score for this activity is 1 and you got the point for any number of sentences guessed.

semantics.label: Score Explanation for All Sentences
semantics.default: Score = number of guessed sentences / number of sentences in this activity.

semantics.label: Score Explanation for All Words (Wordle option)
semantics.default: Score = number of words found / number of words tried.

semantics.label: Score Explanation for All Sentences with selected number of words
semantics.default: Score = number of guessed sentences / number of sentences containing @words words.
semantics.description: @words will be replaced by the number of words per sentence selected by the user on the initial screen

semantics.label: Text for the Summary page header
Text for the number of Sentences guessed (on the summary page)
Text for the number of Words  guessed (on the summary page)
Text for Word not found (Wordle option)
Text for the number of Solutions viewed (on the summary page)
Text for the total time spent (on the summary page)
Text for the total number of rounds used (on the summary page)
Assistive technology label for input field
semantics.description: Use @num and @total to replace current cloze number and total cloze number

semantics.label: Assistive technology label for saying an input has a tip tied to it

fields.label: Body text
fields.default: Are you sure you wish to view the summary?

fields.label: Body text
fields.default: All progress and selections will be cleared. Do you wish to continue?
